title: NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory (JPL)
description: NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, the leading center for robotic exploration of the solar system.
text:
NewsCategory: News.|EarthCategory: Earth.
NASA, SpaceX Launch US-European Satellite to Monitor Earth’s Oceans
Sentinel-6B will extend a decades-long legacy of global sea level measurements that help forecast weather, protect coastal communities, and more. .
Nov. 16, 2025
MissionCategory: Mission.|currentCategory: current.
Sentinel-6B Satellite
Sentinel-6B is a joint mission led by NASA and ESA (European Space Agency) that will provide essential sea level and other ocean data after it launches in November 2025. The satellite will eventually take over from its twin, Sentinel-6 Michael Freilich, which launched in 2020. .
Launch date: Nov. 16, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|EarthCategory: Earth.
NASA, European Partners Set to Launch Sentinel-6B Earth Satellite
Set to track sea levels across more than 90% of Earth’s ocean, the mission must first get into orbit. Here’s what to expect. .
Nov. 15, 2025
NewsCategory: News.|EarthCategory: Earth.
NASA Sets Launch Coverage for International Ocean Tracking Mission
The agency is preparing to launch Sentinel-6B, an international satellite that will measure sea surface height for 90% of the planet’s ocean. .
Nov. 14, 2025
